{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TD Fable["Fable
(Service manager, RestClient, logging)"] --> Orchestrator["MeadowProviderOffline
(Orchestrator)"] Orchestrator --> DataCacheMgr["Data Cache Mgr"] Orchestrator --> IPCOratorMgr["IPC Orator Mgr"] Orchestrator --> RestClientInterceptor["RestClient Interceptor"] Orchestrator --> DirtyRecordTracker["DirtyRecord Tracker"] Orchestrator --> BlobStoreMgr["Blob Store Mgr"] DataCacheMgr --> SQLite["sql.js (WASM)
or Native Bridge"] IPCOratorMgr --> SQLite BlobStoreMgr --> IndexedDB["IndexedDB
or Delegate"] ","style":"notebook"}
